authors.author: Brian Doerksen
Albert Frey
O Herr, gieße Ströme (Ströme lebendigen Wassers)

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Let your living water Flow over my soul, Let your Holy Spirit Come and take control In every situation That has troubled my mind All my cares and burdens Unto you, I roll.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Father, Father, Father. (x2) Jesus, Jesus, Jesus. (x2) Spirit, Spirit, Spirit, (x2) Master, Master, Master, (x2) Healer, Healer, Healer. (x2) Believer, Believer, Believer. (x2)
